title: The World's Need
content:
So many gods, so many creeds,
        So many paths that wind and wind,
        While just the art of being kind,
    Is all the sad world needs.
meaning:
Ella Wheeler Wilcox's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The World's Need"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
